hook.name: Meme Strategy Hook (Ethereum)
hook.description: A Uniswap v4 hook for the MEMS meme token that collects dynamic asymmetric swap fees (Phase 1: 50%, Phase 2: 10–90%) on ETH↔MEMS swaps, splitting proceeds 80/20 between a strategy contract and treasury. Includes anti-snipe protection that blocks public swaps until trading is activated by the strategy.
